provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, slight human woman in her 50s with sharp features and quick eyes that miss nothing, wearing surprisingly intact civilian clothing — a dark grey jacket over a clean-ish thermal top, practical trousers, good boots, she looks almost Compact-legal which is the point, a concealed data pad in an inner jacket pocket, a personal comm device that has been modified beyond manufacturer specs, no brands no faction marks no visible weapons, she sells information and looking unremarkable is her primary defense
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy, superhero, symmetrical matching armor

judgment.explanation: Sable Reach outlaw. Salvaged, stolen, and improvised gear. Nothing matches, nothing is new, everything tells a survival story.
